name: smart-library-iot-sim
description: Smart Library Noise and Comfort Monitor (Simulation-first, IoT Architecture and Protocol)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,sim,frontend -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @smart-library/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @smart-library/simulator dev" "pnpm --filter @smart-library/frontend dev"
